article.title: Uber Amsterdam (SE1) Interview Experience
article.content:
Application Process-
1. Coding Assessment 
2. Technical Interview- Graph problem to determine the cost value after conversion to different currency, provided a list of currencies and their conversion values.

Solved the question in 20 minutes alongwith coding. The interviewer was satisfied, she asked for some improvements in the variable names and asked for any changes that would improve the solution. However, I felt that it was all good.

But after a month, recieved the rejection with no feedback or anything. Still don't get what happened.

post.content: Hello there, thank you for sharing the problem, was the problem the same one as this: https://leetcode.com/problems/maximize-amount-after-two-days-of-conversions/ ?\n\nThanks in advance!
I think you did not provide optimal solution.
Have you asked about their feedback in follow up letter?
Yoe? Also how did you apply?\n
